summary: Geo-fencing & Live Map feature testing completed. All backend APIs working correctly. Fixed critical frontend bug (MapPin import missing). Live Map tab, GPS setup dialog, and SE dashboard all functional.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test project proj_12f23331b542
context_for_next_testing_agent: Geo-fencing features fully tested. Backend APIs: PATCH /api/projects/{id}/set-location (Google Maps URL parsing), POST /api/attendance/track-location (GPS tracking with geo-fence), GET /api/attendance/live-locations (PM Live Map data). Frontend: Live Map tab in PlanningBoard shows map with project markers and 5km radius circles, GPS setup dialog in ProjectDetail works with Google Maps URL input, SE Dashboard shows project locations map.

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: MapPin icon from lucide-react was used but not imported, causing 'MapPin is not defined' runtime error
bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.fix: Added MapPin to the lucide-react import statement

backend: PATCH /api/projects/{id}/set-location - Google Maps URL parsing (@lat,lng, ?q=lat,lng, /place/@lat,lng formats)
POST /api/attendance/track-location - GPS ping storage within geo-fence
POST /api/attendance/track-location - Auto-logout detection when >5km from project
GET /api/attendance/live-locations - Returns active SEs and projects with GPS
GET /api/attendance/live-locations - Permission check (403 for Site Engineer)
frontend: PlanningBoard Live Map tab with Radio icon
Live Map shows Leaflet map with project markers
Legend showing Project Location and Active Site Engineer
ProjectDetail GPS Set badge when project has coordinates
GPS setup dialog with Google Maps URL input
GPS badge on projects with coordinates
